seo.title: Nano Banana 2 - Grounded Image Generation & Editing | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Generate grounded stills with Nano Banana 2 in MaxVideoAI. 0.5K to 4K outputs, wide and extreme aspect ratios, up to 14 references for edits, and optional web-grounded prompting.

overview: Nano Banana 2 is the more flexible still-image branch in the Nano Banana family: cheaper 0.5K drafts, 1K to 4K finals, broader aspect ratios, larger edit sets, and optional web grounding when you need fresher references inside the same MaxVideoAI image workspace.

hero.title: Nano Banana 2 - Grounded text-to-image and editing
hero.intro: Flexible still generation for research-backed concepts, wider layouts, and multi-reference edits.

items.title: Wide-format campaign stills and hero banners
Grounded moodboards with current visual cues
Product edits from larger reference sets

promptStructure.title: Prompt mini-guide
promptStructure.quote: [Subject] in [environment], [composition], [lighting/style], [use-case], and [what should stay fixed or change].
promptStructure.description: Lead with subject and composition, then add style, materials, and delivery context. For grounded prompts, explain what current references or trend signals matter.
steps: Target layout or aspect ratio intent
Grounding context if web search is enabled
Resolution choice for draft versus final

tips.title: Tips and limits
items: Use 0.5K or 1K for fast exploration, then rerun approved frames at 2K or 4K.
Enable web search only when current external context matters; it adds a flat request fee.
Use up to 14 references in Edit mode when you need to lock product details, palette, or set dressing.
Extreme ratios like 4:1 or 8:1 work best when you describe composition zones explicitly.

prompts.title: Grounded retail concept
prompts.prompt: Design a premium skincare launch still inspired by current luxury retail display language, pale stone pedestal, controlled daylight, restrained serif typography, polished campaign finish.

prompts.title: Ultra-wide architecture board
prompts.prompt: 8:1 panoramic still of a futuristic airport concourse at sunrise, polished concrete, long reflections, sparse travelers, cinematic but editorially clean composition.

prompts.title: Multi-reference product cleanup
prompts.prompt: Combine these reference images into one final campaign still: keep the bag silhouette and stitching exact, unify the leather tone, clean reflections, and match the soft studio lighting.

faqs.q: How does Nano Banana 2 pricing work?
faqs.a: Pricing is per image: $0.04 at 0.5K, $0.08 at 1K, $0.12 at 2K, and $0.16 at 4K. Optional web search adds $0.015 per request.

faqs.q: How many images can I generate per run?
How many reference images can I use in Edit mode?
faqs.a: Up to 14 references in the MaxVideoAI image workspace for Nano Banana 2 edits.

pricingNotes: $0.08 per 1K image. 0.5K is $0.04, 2K is $0.12, 4K is $0.16, and optional web search adds $0.015 per request.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for grounded stills, wide layouts, and larger multi-image edit workflows.
custom.heroDesc1: Nano Banana 2 gives you cheaper draft passes, wider aspect-ratio coverage, and optional web-grounded prompting in the same image workflow.
custom.heroDesc2: It is the easiest Nano Banana variant to use when you need broader framing or larger reference sets without jumping to a separate tool.
heroHighlights: Cheaper draft loop||0.5K and 1K are good for early layout passes before you lock finals.
Broader framing options||Supports auto, standard, and extreme aspect ratios like 4:1 and 8:1.
Larger edit sets||Up to 14 reference images for product and moodboard-driven edits.
Optional grounding||Enable web search when a brief depends on current visual references.
custom.whatIntro1: Choose Create or Edit, set image count, pick your ratio and resolution, then decide whether web grounding or deeper thinking is useful for the request.
custom.whatIntro2: For edits, load one or more references, verify the live price chip, and generate directly from the shared MaxVideoAI wallet.
whatFlowSteps: Select Nano Banana 2 in the Image Lab
Set image count, aspect ratio, and resolution
Optionally enable web search, output format, seed, or thinking level
Add references if you are editing and launch the run
custom.tipsIntro: Nano Banana 2 is most effective when you separate composition intent from styling intent and only enable grounding when the prompt truly needs fresh context.
strengths: Use 0.5K and 1K to reduce cost while testing composition.
Describe wide or tall frames explicitly when you use extreme ratios.
If web grounding is enabled, state what current cues matter so the search context is useful.
For multi-reference edits, assign a role to each reference and say what must remain unchanged.
boundaries: Web search is optional and billed per request.
Edit mode accepts up to 14 reference images.
safetyRules: No sexual content and nothing involving minors.
No hateful, harassing, or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.
Do not include private personal data or sensitive documents.
custom.promptingTitle: How to write a strong Nano Banana 2 prompt
custom.promptingIntro: Nano Banana 2 responds best to clear composition instructions, explicit edit constraints, and grounded context only when needed.
custom.promptingTip: Tip: use the UI for ratio, resolution, seed, web search, and output format. Keep the prompt focused on subject, layout, style, and what should stay fixed.
promptingGlobalPrinciples: Describe the frame before the style treatment.
For edits, say what to keep and what to change.
Only use grounding when live or current context matters.
promptingEngineWhy: Wide ratios work better with explicit compositional zones.
Large reference sets help, but roles per reference keep the edit cleaner.
Grounded prompts should still be specific about the target aesthetic.
